import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; const Fees = () => { const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('structure'); const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState(''); // Force reload on first load to ensure latest version useEffect(() => { const hasReloaded = localStorage.getItem('fees-page-reloaded'); if (!hasReloaded) { console.log('Force reloading fees page...'); localStorage.setItem('fees-page-reloaded', 'true'); window.location.reload(); } }, []); // Sample fee structures const feeStructures = [ { id: 1, name: 'B.Tech Computer Science', semester: 'Semester 1', totalFees: 125000, breakdown: { tuition: 75000, library: 5000, laboratory: 10000, examination: 3000, development: 5000, alumni: 5000, hostel: 22000 } }, { id: 2, name: 'M.B.A Business Administration', semester: 'Semester 1', totalFees: 95000, breakdown: { tuition: 60000, library: 3000, examination: 2500, development: 3000, alumni: 2500, other: 24000 } }, { id: 3, name: 'B.Sc Physics', semester: 'Semester 1', totalFees: 110000, breakdown: { tuition: 70000, library: 2000, laboratory: 15000, examination: 3000, development: 2000, alumni: 2000, other: 16000 } } ]; // Sample payment history const paymentHistory = [ { id: 1, studentName: 'Rahul Kumar', course: 'B.Tech Computer Science', semester: 'Semester 1', amount: 125000, paymentDate: '2024-01-15', status: 'Paid', transactionId: 'TXN123456789' }, { id: 2, studentName: 'Priya Sharma', course: 'M.B.A Business Administration', semester: 'Semester 1', amount: 47500, paymentDate: '2024-01-20', status: 'Paid', transactionId: 'TXN123456790' }, { id: 3, studentName: 'Amit Singh', course: 'B.Sc Physics', semester: 'Semester 1', amount: 55000, paymentDate: '2024-01-25', status: 'Partial', transactionId: 'TXN123456791' } ]; const formatCurrency = (amount) => { console.log('Testing currency formatting:', amount, '→', new Intl.NumberFormat('en-IN', { style: 'currency', currency: 'INR', minimumFractionDigits: 0 }).format(amount)); return new Intl.NumberFormat('en-IN', { style: 'currency', currency: 'INR', minimumFractionDigits: 0 }).format(amount); }; const filteredStructures = feeStructures.filter(fee => fee.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) || fee.course.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) ); const filteredPayments = paymentHistory.filter(payment => payment.studentName.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) || payment.course.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) ); return (
